headline: AI for Workplace Safety: Computer Vision Monitoring, Fall Detection, and Hazard Prevention
description: AI workplace safety uses computer vision to monitor PPE compliance, detect falls, and identify hazards in real-time. From Amazon warehouses to construction sites, AI safety systems reduce workplace incidents by 25-40% by catching risks that human safety monitors miss.

citation.name: Computer Vision for Workplace Safety: PPE Detection, Hazard Monitoring, and Ergonomic Assessment (2024 Comprehensive Survey)
Predictive Safety Analytics: Machine Learning for Near-Miss Analysis and Injury Prevention
